description: Connection settings for the Pexels stock-photo service. Configure the API key here to let instructors pick a free course image from Pexels in the course form.

fields.description: Master switch. When unchecked, the Pexels picker raises a friendly error instead of calling the upstream API.
fields.label: Enabled

fields.description: Your Pexels API key (https://www.pexels.com/api/). Stored encrypted.
fields.label: API Key

fields.description: Base URL for the Pexels API. Override only if Pexels changes their endpoint.
fields.label: Base URL

fields.description: How many photos to fetch per search page (1-80).
fields.label: Results Per Page

name: Pexels Settings
